title: Nichijou - My Ordinary Life
sourceNotes: Single 26-episode TV season (2011, Kyoto Animation). Nichijou is a slice-of-life gag manga by Keiichi Arawi with no continuous story arcs — just episodic vignettes — so the adaptation is treated as one entry plus an unadapted tail. The manga's first run ended in 2015 (vol 10, ~ch 192) but was revived in 2021 and is ONGOING (12 volumes / roughly ch 231 as of vol 12, Oct 2024); chapter counting is fuzzy because installments are short numbered segments with half-numbered entries. The anime adapts material from roughly vols 1-7 (ch 1-124), reordered and interleaved with KyoAni-original segments. The related 'Episode 0' is an OVA (no theatrical film exists), so no movies are listed.
